title: nageia macrophylla
intro: Nageia macrophylla, also known as the Queensland Kauri or Nageia, is a species of coniferous tree native to the tropical rainforests of New Guinea and nearby islands. The medicinal properties of Nageia macrophylla include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which are derived from its essential oils and resin. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Nageia macrophylla is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
